api.errors.ApiMethodNotYetImplementedErr: 此 API 方法尚未實作。
api.errors.GenericApiError: 發生錯誤，請稍候再試一次。

api.errors.assetOverflowError: 在UTXO內的代幣超過最大值(溢出)。
api.errors.checkAdressesInUseApiError: 檢查已使用地址時出現伺服器錯誤。
api.errors.currentCoinPriceError: 目前沒有可用的幣價數據。
api.errors.discoverAddressesError: 查找地址時出現 api 方法呼叫錯誤。

api.errors.getBestBlockApiError: 取得最佳區塊時從伺服器收到錯誤。
api.errors.getCatalystRoundApiError: 取得 catalyst 資訊時從伺服器收到錯誤。
api.errors.getMultiAssetMintMetadataApiE: 查詢鑄造中繼資料時從伺服器收到錯誤。
api.errors.getPoolInfoApiError: 取得質押池資訊時從伺服器收到錯誤。
api.errors.getRewardHistoryApiError: 取得獎勵歷史紀錄時從伺服器收到錯誤。
api.errors.getTokenInfoApiError: 取得代幣資訊時從伺服器收到錯誤。
api.errors.getTxHistoryForAddressesApiEr: 取得交易資訊時從伺服器收到錯誤。
api.errors.getUtxoDataError: 取得 UTXO 資料時從伺服器收到錯誤。
api.errors.getUtxosForAddressesApiError: 取得 UTxOs 時從伺服器收到錯誤。
api.errors.hardwareUnsupportedError: 目前所選的硬體不支援此操作。
api.errors.histoicalCoinPriceError: 沒有可用的歷史幣價資料。
api.errors.invalidMnemonicError: 輸入的短語無效, 請檢查
api.errors.noInputsError: 從恢復短語恢復的錢包是空的。請先檢查您的恢復短語，並再次嘗試恢復。
api.errors.noOutputsError: Transaction requires at least 1 output, but no output was added
api.errors.poolMissingApiError: 找不到此質押池。請再次確認 ID，並確保該質押池尚未被註銷。
api.errors.sendTransactionApiError: 傳送交易時出現伺服器錯誤。
api.errors.sendTransactionError: 傳送交易時出現 api 方法呼叫錯誤。
api.errors.serverStatusError: 連接到服務器失敗。請查看你的互聯網連接或我們的Twitter(https://twitter.com/YoroiWallet)。
api.errors.unusedAddressesError: 您不能產生超過20個連續的未使用地址。
app.errors.storageLoadError: 存取儲存空間失敗，Yoroi需要能夠存取儲存空間("IndexedDB") 來管理錢包，您的瀏覽器可能不支援IndexedDB或是因為隱私設定該功能被關閉(例如無痕瀏覽模式)
app.errors.unexpectedError: 意想不到的事情發生了。請重試。
banners.bring.title: 購物時賺取 ADA 🛍️
banners.bring.desc: 每次以法定貨幣購買時均可獲得即時 ADA 現金回饋獎勵 - 輕鬆累積您的投資組合。
banners.usda.title: 使用 Yoroi 兌換 USDA
banners.usda.desc: 在 Yoroi 內輕鬆兌換 USDA，享受 Cardano 首個原生穩定幣的強大功能。
buysell.dialog.disclaimerText: Yoroi Wallet 利用第三方 web3 上下坡道解決方案實現 Fiat-ADA 直接交換。 點擊“繼續”，即表示您確認您將被重定向到我們合作夥伴的網站，您可能需要在該網站上接受他們的條款和條件。 請注意，第三方 web3 解決方案可能會根據您的位置和金融機構而受到限制。
buysell.dialog.error.dialog.title: url 產生器
buysell.dialog.fail.text: 此服務目前無法使用，請稍後重試。
buysell.dialog.longloading.text: 我們正在將您重新導向至 Yoroi 以外的地方，請稍等。
buysell.dialog.title: 購買 / 出售 ADA
buysell.end.text: 恭喜！ 🎉 您的交易正在進行中，您應該很快就會收到資金。
buySell.disclaimer.title: 免責聲明
buySell.disclaimer.description: 點擊“繼續”，即表示您確認您將被重定向至第三方服務提供者，該提供者為法定貨幣到 ADA 交易提供 Web3 上下坡解決方案。您可能需要同意第三方提供者的條款、條件和隱私權政策才能完成交易。 Yoroi Wallet 不控制、認可或承擔第三方提供的內容、安全、政策或服務的責任。
buySell.disclaimer.note1: Yoroi Wallet 對使用第三方服務時可能發生的任何損失、延遲或錯誤不承擔任何責任。
buySell.disclaimer.note2: 交易可能會受到基於您的地理位置、適用法律、金融機構政策或服務提供者的限制的限制。
buySell.disclaimer.note3: 請確保您已閱讀並理解第三方的條款，因為您的互動將完全受其協議的約束。
buySell.disclaimer.note4: Yoroi Wallet 不會收集或儲存任何透過第三方平台提交的個人或財務資料。
cashback.claim.dialog.instruction.hardwa: 在您的硬體錢包上確認以領取現金回饋獎勵。
cashback.claim.dialog.instruction.passwo: 輸入您的密碼來領取現金回饋獎勵。
cashback.claim.dialog.message.label: 訊息
cashback.claim.dialog.title: 索取現金回饋
cashback.disclaimer: 點擊“繼續”，即表示您確認您將被重定向至以 ADA 貨幣提供現金回饋服務的第三方服務提供者。您可能需要同意第三方提供者的條款、條件和隱私權政策才能完成交易。 Yoroi Wallet 不控制、認可或承擔第三方提供的內容、安全、政策或服務的責任。
cashback.disclaimer.note.1: 1. Yoroi Wallet 對使用第三方服務時可能發生的任何損失、延遲或錯誤不承擔任何責任。
cashback.disclaimer.note.2: 2. 交易可能會根據您的地理位置、適用法律、金融機構政策或服務提供者的限製而受到限制。
cashback.disclaimer.note.3: 3. 確保您已閱讀並瞭解第三方的條款，因為您的互動完全受其協議的約束。
cashback.disclaimer.note.4: 4.Yoroi Wallet 不會收集或儲存透過第三方平台提交的任何個人或財務資料。
cashback.not.current.warning.text: 您的現金回饋目前已連結至另一個錢包。若要領取 ADA 現金回饋，請切換至回饋錢包，或將回饋錢包更改為您現在正在使用的錢包。您隨時都可以進入設定來變更現金回饋錢包，讓領取回饋更符合您的需求。
cashback.not.current.warning.text.choose: 您的現金回饋目前已連結至另一個錢包。
切換錢包以領取您的回饋，或將此錢包設為您的現金回饋錢包。
cashback.not.current.warning.text.switch: 您將無法再領取與先前現金回饋錢包相關的回饋，除非您再次將其連結。
cashback.not.current.warning.title: 警告
cashback.not.current.warning.title.set.c: 將我目前的錢包設為我的現金回饋錢包
connector.connect.cashback.apply.all: 您所選擇的錢包將適用於所有合作網站。

connector.connect.info: 您的連線偏好設定將會儲存到您的 Yoroi dApp 清單中。

connector.signin.reorg.message: 若要在 Cardano 中與 {smartContractsLink} 互動，您需要新增保證金，這表示您需進行一筆 0 ADA 的交易。{lineBreak}{lineBreak}這是一項防止智能合約失敗與詐騙的保證措施。請參閱 {learnMoreLink} 以了解更多關於保證的資訊。

global.labels.contactSupport: 如果這種情況持續發生，請聯絡我們的客服團隊。
global.labels.name: 名稱
global.publicKey.explanation: 公開金鑰允許查看錢包的交易紀錄，但不允許花費或移轉資金（未包含私鑰）
global.staleTxnWarningLine1: 自您創建此交易後，您的錢包已更改。
global.staleTxnWarningLine2: 您仍然可以發送此交易，但可能會失敗。

incorrectTime.line3: 請同步您裝置的時間以解決此問題

maintenance.screen.explanation: Yoroi正在維護中，您仍可透過其他錢包軟體來存取您的資金。

networkError.label.message:
警告：與伺服器的連接失敗。

notprod.label.message: WARNING: non-production build. If unexpected, double-check Yoroi installation.
profile.analytics.collectedData: 收集的資料包括：造訪過的 Yoroi 擴充功能頁面、瀏覽器版本、所選語言、分析事件的時間
profile.analytics.learnMore: 深入了解使用者洞察資訊
profile.analytics.line1: 提供關於造訪的擴充功能頁面、瀏覽器版本、所選語言以及分析事件時間的匿名分析資料
profile.analytics.line2: 您隨時可以透過設定選擇退出，這不會影響您的使用體驗
profile.analytics.line4: 我們不會記錄 IP 位址
profile.analytics.rejectionImpact: 選擇退出不會影響您的使用體驗
profile.analytics.share: 分享使用者洞察，有助於我們調整 Yoroi，以更好地滿足使用者的偏好與需求。
profile.analytics.title: 加入我們，一同改善 Yoroi 的使用體驗
profile.complexityLevel.advanced.descrip: I have a some understanding of blockchain and how cryptography is used to power both the blockchain itself and wallet software. I am okay with seeing options and functionality that critically depend on my understanding of these concepts.
profile.complexityLevel.selected.label: Your currently level of Complexity is
profile.complexityLevel.selected.labelWi: 您目前的複雜度等級為：{level}
profile.complexityLevel.simple.descripti: Simplest experience possible. No previous knowledge in Blockchain required. Highly friendly to on-board beginners, and for users that prefer simplicity.
profile.complexityLevel.subtitle: Understanding blockchain can be difficult, which is why we will try and keep the interface as simple as possible for you
profile.complexityLevel.title: 介面複雜等級
profile.languageSelect.title: 語言選取
profile.languageSelect.tosAgreement: 我同意服務條款協議及隱私權聲明
profile.nighly.slogan: Cardano 資產的測試網路錢包
profile.nightly.header: Yoroi Nightly automatically updates nightly with the latest in-progress features. Although we will never intentionally push bugs or broken code, features may still be in-progress or contain errors.
profile.nightly.recommendation1: 您只使用餘額較小的錢包以將風險降到最低。
profile.nightly.recommendation2: 您可以透過 Yoroi Nightly 頻道向 EMURGO 回報任何問題。
profile.nightly.title: Yoroi Nightly
profile.nightly.warning1: Yoroi Nightly 並非運行於模擬區塊鏈或測試伺服器上。
profile.nightly.warning2: 您所發送的任何交易都將在區塊鏈上以及正式伺服器中可見。
profile.termsOfUse.updateText: 我們已更新服務條款協議與隱私權政策，以提升您的使用體驗。請閱讀並接受，以繼續使用 Yoroi。
profile.termsOfUse.updateTitle: 服務條款協議與隱私權聲明已更新
profile.uriAccept.seePrompt: 只需點擊允許 即可啟用付款網址
profile.uriPrompt.form.explanation: Yoroi 將允許您在接收頁面產生用來分享的特殊連結，以便更快、更輕鬆地接收付款。您隨時可以在設定中啟用此功能。
profile.uriPrompt.form.heading: 允許 Cardano 付款網址
serverError.label.message:
警告：伺服器遇到問題。
請查看我們的Twitter帳戶。
在我們的伺服器恢復正常之前，顯示的餘額和交易記錄可能不正確，但您的實際餘額不受影響。
settings.display.blog: 您可以閱讀我們的 {blogLink}，了解如何使用此功能。
settings.display.themeNote: 注意：變更主題將會移除自訂設定。
settings.display.themeWarning: 變更主題將會移除自訂設定
settings.externalStorage.intro: 選擇一個外部儲存服務來連接您的帳戶並儲存備忘錄。
settings.externalStorage.title: 連接一個帳號
settings.general.aboutYoroi.label: 關於 Yoroi
settings.general.languageSelect.info: 對 EMURGO 來說，Yoroi 的友好是一個重要主題。我們相信用您的母語會更容易理解區塊鏈概念。我們嘗試支援盡可能多的語言，但為了提供更廣泛的語言選擇，我們需要接受社群翻譯人員的幫助。所選語言的翻譯完全由社區提供。
settings.general.languageSelect.labelInf: 選擇的語言翻譯由社區志願者提供
settings.general.switchNetwork.dialog.te: Cardano 網路是一個技術基礎架構，將 Cardano 節點及其互動整合為一個統一的系統。它由一組彼此通訊的節點組成，以維護分散式帳本。
settings.general.testnetModal.title: 什麼是測試網路?
settings.general.testnetModal.subtitle: 測試網絡為社群和開發人員提供了一個平台，用於測試產品和實驗，而無需在主網上冒用真實資金的風險。
settings.general.testnetModal.easilyObta: 可輕鬆從 Cardano 來源獲取。
settings.general.testnetModal.learnMore: 深入了解 Cardano 中的各種網路

settings.menu.termsOfUse.link.label: 使用條款
settings.menu.wallet.link.label: 錢包
settings.noexternal.dialog.content: 您的備註會儲存在本地裝置上且不會自動與其他 Yoroi 實體服務同步，若您刪除 Yoroi，這些備註將會遺失
settings.noexternal.dialog.title: 沒有外部儲存空間
settings.revamp.unitOfAccount.note: 請注意，幣價為預估值，可能與實際交易平台上的價格不符。任何基於此價格預估所進行的交易均須自行承擔風險
settings.support.paperWallet.title: 紙錢包
settings.support.faq.content: 若您遇到問題，請參閱 {faqLink}，瞭解已知問題處理指導。
settings.support.faq.title: 常見問題集
settings.support.logs.content: 若想檢查記錄，您可以 {downloadLogsLink}。記錄不包含機密資訊，將這些記錄附加至問題報告，幫助團隊調查您遇到的問題非常有用。使用錯誤報告功能時，可以自動附加記錄。
settings.support.logs.title: 記錄
settings.support.reportProblem.content: 若常見問題集未解決您遇到的問題，請使用我們的 {supportRequestLink} 功能。
settings.support.reportProblem.title: 報告問題
settings.theme.selectColorTheme: 為舊版本選擇色彩主題
settings.unitOfAccount.label: 貨幣
settings.unitOfAccount.note: 注意：幣價為預估值，可能與實際交易平台上的價格不符。任何基於此價格預估所進行的交易均須自行承擔風險。
settings.unitOfAccount.revamp.label: 選擇貨幣
settings.unitOfAccount.title: 法定貨幣配對
notifications.settings.title: In-app 通知
notifications.settings.description: 允許顯示 in-app 通知，以提示重要交易
settings.cashback.title: 現金回饋獎勵錢包
settings.cashback.note: 您目前連接的錢包是用來接收 ADA 現金回饋獎勵的指定錢包，並適用於所有合作網站。您可隨時切換至其他錢包，以確保回饋發送至您偏好的錢包，或選擇「無」以拒絕使用此服務。
settings.cashback.label: 已連結的錢包
swap.actions.slippageToleranceTooltip: 滑價容忍度是以總兌換價值的百分比來設定的。如果價格變動超過此設定值，您的交易將不會被執行
swap.actions.slippageToleranceHigh: 當滑價容忍度設定得過高時，即使價格大幅波動，交易仍可能完成。這可能導致被前置交易（front-running）或三明治攻擊（sandwich attack）等風險。
swap.cancelOrder.title: 取消訂單
swap.cancelOrder.content: 您確定要取消此訂單嗎？
swap.totalReturnedTooltip: 取消訂單後退回至您錢包的金額
swap.limitPriceTooltip: 去中心化交易所（DEX）中的限價是指您預先設定的一個特定價格，用來交易某項資產。與市價單不同，限價單僅在市場價格達到您所設定的價格時才會執行。
swap.limitPriceContent: 您確定要以比市場價格高出 10% 或以上的限價繼續執行此訂單嗎？
swap.marketPriceTooltip: 市場價格是多個去中心化交易所（DEX）中可用的最佳價格，讓您能立即買入或賣出資產
swap.priceImpactTooltip: 價格影響是指由於交易規模造成的實際市場價格與您的交易價格之間的差異。
swap.priceImpactSevere: 價格影響超過 10% 可能會導致資金大幅損失，請務必注意並謹慎操作。
swap.priceImpactNotSevere: 價格影響超過 1% 可能會導致您實際收到的金額有所差異，請自行評估風險後再進行操作。
swap.noAssetFoundToSwap: 未找到可進行兌換的資產
swap.pairNotAvailable: 所選交易對在任何流動性池中均不可用
swap.adaDepositTooltip: A small ADA deposit that will be returned when your order is processed or canceled
swap.minimumAssetsTooltip: 在價格滑點的情況下，你保證至少會收到的最小金額
swap.lpFeeTooltip: 固定的 0.3% 手續費會支付給流動性提供者，作為他們提供代幣的獎勵，從而讓交易者能在 Cardano 去中心化網路上買賣資產
swap.checkTx: Check this transaction in the list of wallet transactions
swap.txNotProcessed: Your transaction has not been processed properly due to technical issues
swap.notEnoughBalanceFees: 餘額不足，請考量到手續費
swap.startDoingSwaps: 開始進行兌換操作後，您將能在此處查看您的開放訂單
swap.testnet.message: 請切換網路，以便在 Yoroi 中使用兌換功能
swap.testnet.title: 兌換功能僅在主網上可用
transfer.form.instructions.step1.text: 恢復你的餘額大約需要1分鐘。在下一步, 您將看到一筆將從Daedalus移動您所有資金到Yoroi的交易。請仔細閱讀交易細節。您需要在卡Cardano網絡上支付標準交易費用才能進行交易。

wallet.add.optionDialog.connect.hw.ledge: Ledger硬件錢包是一個小型的USB設備，它能為您的錢包增加額外的安全性。它之所以更安全是因為您的密鑰從未離開硬件錢包。即便您的電腦因為惡意軟件，釣魚攻擊等而安全受損您的資金仍然可以保持安全。
wallet.add.optionDialog.connect.hw.trezo: Trezor硬件錢包是一個小型的USB設備，它能為您的錢包增加額外的安全性。它之所以更安全是因為您的密鑰從未離開硬件錢包。即便您的電腦因為惡意軟件，釣魚攻擊等而安全受損您的資金仍然可以保持安全。
wallet.add.optionDialog.restore.normalWa: If you have a recovery phrase consisting of {length} words, choose this option to restore your wallet.
wallet.add.optionDialog.restore.paperWal: 如果您已生成了一個Yoroi紙錢包(通常打印後離線保存)，您可以選擇此選項將紙錢包中的資金導入。
wallet.add.optionDialog.walletEra.byronE: Wallets created before July 29th, 2020 are Byron-era wallets and cannot delegate.

wallet.backup.dialog.legacy.explanation:
If you had any ADA in your wallet on November 29th, 2019
    you have to upgrade your wallet to a Shelley "reward wallet".
wallet.backup.privacy.warning.dialog.che: 確保無人窺視您的螢幕，除非您希望他們存取您的資金。
wallet.backup.privacy.warning.dialog.rec: 在下列螢幕上，您將看到一組 15個 隨機單詞。這是您的錢包恢復短語備份片語。可將其輸入任何版本的 Daedalus 應用程式，以備份或恢復您的錢包資金與私密金鑰。
wallet.backup.recovery.phrase.display.di:
請確保您已於某個安全之處小心地寫下您的復原片語。
    您下一次使用與復原時將需要用到此片語。片語區分大小寫。
wallet.backup.recovery.phrase.entry.dial: 我明白我的密鑰是安全地儲存在此設備上，而不是公司的伺服器上。

我瞭解，若此應用程式被移至另一個裝置，或者被刪除，我的資金
    僅可使用備份片語復原，該備份片語已在某個安全之處寫下。
按正確順序點選每個單詞，驗證您的復原片語
wallet.connect.hw.dialog.step.about.prer: 您的電腦在整個過程中, 必須保持與互聯網的連接。
wallet.connect.hw.dialog.step.connect.in: 這個過程將與Yoroi共享Cardano公開公鑰。
wallet.connect.hw.dialog.step.save.label: 保存
wallet.connect.ledger.dialog.common.step: 點擊此處了解有關使用Yoroi和Ledger的更多情報
Cardano ADA 應用程式必須安裝在Ledger設備上。
Cardano ADA 應用程式必須在Ledger設備上保持打開狀態。
在整個過程中, Ledger 設備必須保持與電腦的連接。
wallet.connect.ledger.dialog.step.connec: 將 Ledger 設備連接到電腦USB後, 按下連接按鈕。

wallet.connect.trezor.dialog.common.step: 點擊此處了解有關使用Yoroi和Trezor的更多情報
Trezor 裝置需使用 2.1.0 或以上版本。支援的 Trezor 型號包括：
Trezor 設備必須預先初始化。
在整個過程中, Trezor 設備必須保持與電腦的連接。

wallet.connect.trezor.error.101: 無法連接trezor.io。請檢查您的互聯網連接, 然後重試。
wallet.create.dialog.howToSaveRecoveryPh: 請確保沒有人正在查看您的螢幕。
建議將恢復助記詞備份 2 到 3 份，並分別存放於不同的安全地點。
Write the recovery phrase on a piece of paper and store in a secure location like a safety deposit box.
How to save your recovery phrase?
wallet.create.dialog.name.label: 錢包名稱
Remember: you are the only person who should know this recovery phrase.
DO NOT share the recovery phrase as this will allow anyone to access your assets and wallet.
If you lose your recovery phrase, it will not be possible to recover your wallet.
The recovery phrase is the only way to access your wallet.
Yoroi will NEVER ask for the recovery phrase. Watch out for scammers and impersonators.
Read this before saving your recovery phrase

wallet.create.dialog.walletChecksum.firs: {plateImg} Wallet checksum is a generic Blockie image that is generated to visually distinguish your wallet from others.

wallet.create.dialog.walletChecksum.titl: What is wallet checksum and plate number?
wallet.create.dialog.walletNameAndPasswo: It is a wallet identifier that helps you to easier find the exact wallet in your app
You can have different wallet names for the same wallet account connected to different devices
Password is an additional security layer used to confirm transactions from this device
Both wallet name and password are stored locally, so you are only person who can change or restore it.
wallet.create.firstStep.description: A recovery phrase is a secret series of words that can be used to recover your Yoroi Wallet. See the video below how to use a recovery phrase.

wallet.create.firstStep.fourthTip: You are the only person who knows and stores your recovery phrase
wallet.create.firstStep.secondTip: Recovery phrase is the only way to access your wallet
wallet.create.firstStep.shortDescription: Read this information carefully before saving your recovery phrase:
wallet.create.firstStep.thirdTip: If you lose your recovery phrase, it will not be possible to recover your wallet

wallet.settings.delete.accept: I still have the means to restore this wallet
wallet.settings.delete.accept.cashback: I still have the means to restore this wallet and want to stop generating cashback rewards for this wallet.
wallet.settings.delete.warning1.cashback: 移除此錢包不會影響其餘額，但由於它是獎勵錢包，可能會中斷您的現金回饋流程。您也可以在移除此錢包之前，先使用另一個錢包來連接現金回饋功能。
wallet.settings.delete.warning2: Please double-check you still have the means to restore access to this wallet. If you cannot, removing the wallet may result in irreversible loss of funds.
wallet.settings.delete.warning2.cashback: This wallet can be restored again at any time, but double-check if you still have the means to restore access to it. If you cannot, removing the wallet may result in irreversible loss of funds.
wallet.settings.export.explanation: This can be used to transfer a wallet between devices.
wallet.settings.export.label: Export wallet
wallet.settings.name.label: 錢包名稱
wallet.settings.password.description: Password is an additional security layer used to confirm transactions from this device. Password is stored locally, so you are only person who can change or restore it.
wallet.settings.password.title: Wallet password
wallet.settings.publicExport.explanation: The below you can find your wallet's public key information.
wallet.settings.publicExport.reason1: Open your wallet in read-only mode in Yoroi Mobile to easily check your balance at any time
wallet.settings.publicExport.reason2: Share your key with tax software to automatically generate tax reports
wallet.settings.remove.explanation: Removing a wallet does not affect the wallet balance. Your wallet can be restored again at any time.
wallet.settings.remove.label: Remove wallet
wallet.settings.resync.explanation: If you are experiencing issues with your wallet, or think you have an incorrect balance or transaction history, you can delete the local data stored by Yoroi and resync with the blockchain.
wallet.settings.resync.label: Resync wallet with the blockchain
wallet.settings.resync.warning: This will also cause failed transactions to disappear as they are not stored on the blockchain.
wallet.settings.unchangedPassword: 自錢包創建起密碼未改變
wallet.staking.availableTotalRewardsHelp: If the Reward amount is different than expected, see possible reasons of that on our {faqLink}.
wallet.staking.banner.delegateNow: Delegate now with our stake pool and start earning rewards
wallet.staking.banner.delegateToYoroi: Delegate to our DRep and help the Cardano network evolve in a way that benefits your wallet experience.
wallet.staking.banner.firstRewardHelperM: 1 個紀元= 5 天。這表示您會在委託後的第 15 至 20 天收到第一筆獎勵。之後，您將每個紀元（即每 5 天）收到一次獎勵。
wallet.staking.banner.roaHelperMessage: 預估 ROA（ADA 回報率）是根據過去 30 天的質押結果計算得出
wallet.staking.dialogSummaryDescription: Your rewards are automatically staked. You don’t need to withdraw it everytime because you pay a transaction fee.
wallet.staking.overviewContent: Your rewards are automatically staked. You don’t need to withdraw it everytime because you pay a transaction fee.
wallet.staking.warning.pendingTx: You cannot change your delegation preference while a transaction is pending
wallet.summary.page.integratedNotificati: You have successfully integrated with your {deviceName}
wallet.summary.page.walletCreatedNotific: 您已成功創建一個新錢包
wallet.summary.page.walletRestoredNotifi: 您已成功還原您的錢包
wallet.syncingOverlay.explanation: Please wait while we process wallet data. This may take some time.
wallet.syncingOverlay.title: Wallet Syncing
wallet.transaction.certificate.StakeRegi: Stake credential registration and staking delegation
wallet.transaction.certificate.StakeVote: Stake credential registration and staking and voting delegation

wallet.transaction.memo.delete.dialog.co:
Are you sure you want to remove the memo for this transaction?
Doing so will erase all copies of it and you will not be able to restore it in the future.
wallet.transaction.memo.invalid: Memo must be at least 1 and at most {maxMemo} characters.
wallet.transaction.memo.optional.invalid: Memo cannot be more than {maxMemo} characters.
wallet.transaction.transactionFailedInfo: Your transaction has not been processed properly due to technical issues
wallet.transaction.transactionSubmittedI: Check this transaction in the list of wallet transactions
wallet.transaction.success.button.label: Go To Transactions
wallet.transaction.success.explanation: Check this transaction in the list of wallet transactions
wallet.transaction.success.title: Transaction submitted
wallet.transfer.deregister.line1: When withdrawing rewards, you also have the option to deregister the staking key
wallet.transfer.deregister.line2: Deregistering the staking key will give you back your deposit and undelegate the key from any pool
wallet.transfer.deregister.line3: Keeping the staking key will allow you to withdraw the rewards, but continue delegating to the same pool
wallet.transfer.deregister.line4: You should NOT deregister if this staking key is used as a stake pool's reward account, as this will cause all pool operator rewards to be sent back to the reserved
wallet.transfer.deregister.line5: Deregistering means this key will no longer receive rewards until you re-register the staking key (usually by delegating to a pool again)
wallet.transfer.deregister.noNeedToDereg: You do NOT need to deregister to delegate to a different stake pool. You can change your delegation preference at any time
wallet.transfer.deregister.title: Also deregister the staking key?
wallet.transfer.instruction: Any {ticker} claimed will be transferred to your currently selected wallet
wallet.transfer.subInstruction: Learn more about Byron and Shelley eras and how to claim ADA on our
wallet.transitionDialog.currentStakePool: The current stake pool you're using will soon close. Migrate to the new EMURGO pool to sustain reward generation.
wallet.transitionDialog.poolContinues: This pool continues to generate staking rewards
wallet.transitionDialog.poolStop: This pool will stop generating staking rewards in
wallet.transitionDialog.poolNotGeneratin: This pool is NOT generating staking rewards anymore
wallet.undelegation.transaction.warning: Your rewards will automatically get withdrawn once you undelegate from a stake pool. You will also receive back your staking deposit of 2 ADA. If you wish to choose another stake pool, you can change your preference without undelegation.
wallet.unsupported.subtitle: The selected wallet does not support this functionality
wallet.unsupported.title: This wallet type is incompatible.
wallet.voting.dialog.step.confirm.line1: Please enter the PIN as you will need it every time you want to access the Catalyst Voting app.
wallet.voting.dialog.step.pin.actionButt: Confirm that I wrote down the PIN
wallet.voting.dialog.step.pin.line1: Please write down this PIN as you will need it every time you want to access the Catalyst Voting app.
wallet.voting.dialog.step.qr.actionButto: Confirm that I saved the QR code
wallet.voting.dialog.step.qr.line2: The following QR code is the generated certificate required by the Catalyst App to be able to participate in the voting process of Cardano.
wallet.voting.dialog.step.qr.line3: Also we suggest to take a screenshot of it as a backup — you won’t be able to access this QR code after clicking Complete.
wallet.voting.dialog.step.qr.lineTitle: Use the Catalyst Voting App to scan the QR code
wallet.voting.dialog.step.register.line1: Enter your spending password to be able to generate the required certificate for voting.
wallet.voting.dialog.step.trx.ledger.inf: After connecting your Ledger device to your computer’s USB port, press the Register button.
wallet.voting.dialog.step.trx.line1: Confirm your spending password to register in the blockchain the certificate previously generated for voting.
wallet.voting.dialog.step.trx.trezor.inf: After connecting your Trezor device to your computer, press the Register button.
wallet.voting.dialog.title: Register for Voting
wallet.voting.keepDelegated: Your voting power is how much you delegate and the voting rewards will be distributed to your delegation reward address. Please keep delegated until the voting ends.
wallet.voting.ledgerNanoRequirement: Update the Cardano app on your Ledger to version 6 or above with Ledger Live.
wallet.voting.line2: Before you begin, make sure to complete steps below
wallet.voting.line4: Open the Catalyst Voting App and click on the Complete registration button.
wallet.voting.notDelegated: You haven't delegated anything. Your voting power is determined by the amount you delegate and voting rewards are distributed to your delegation reward address. Please remember to delegate prior to voting.
wallet.voting.trezorTRequirement: Update your Trezor device firmware version to 2.4.1 or above.

wallet.withdrawal.transaction.unregister: This transaction will unregister one or more staking keys, giving you back your {refundAmount} {ticker} from your deposit

transaction.review.enterPassword: Enter password to sign this transaction
transaction.review.identifyDrep: Identify your preferred DRep and enter their ID below to delegate your vote:
transaction.review.collateralInfo: Collateral is mandatory when interacting with certain smart contracts on Cardano. ADA will only be deduced from your collateral if transaction validation fails.
transaction.review.interactWithOperation: You are about to interact with operations, which are key components used in governance and various blockchain activities. These include Cardano Governance Certificates, as outlined in CIP-0095, which facilitate governance transactions.
transaction.review.takeHardwareWallet: Take your hardware wallet device and follow the instructions there. Make sure you confirm a trusted action.
transaction.review.rewardsWithdraw: Our rewards will automatically get withdrawn once you undelegate from a stake pool. You will also receive back your staking deposit of 2 ADA. If you wish to choose another stake pool, you can change your preference without undelegation.
